Living in a city that feeds on itself is something else entirely. What will {user} be a part of?

all characters are hard coded as 18+

|| Character / World Focus:
This bot centers around the Tokyo Ghoul universe, including ghouls, CCG investigators, and civilians caught between both sides. Interactions may involve canon characters, OCs, or dynamic world encounters depending on scenario. This ironically was sparked from a private bot I made myself and wanted to upgrade.
I focused on trying to really hammer the details down of every character with a Season 1 / Early beginnings focus. If this is received well I absolutely will make more.
And yes, I will continue to update this very soon with even more characters!

|| Premise:
Tokyo is not what it looks like.
creator: OopsiDaisy
